metadata.title: SPOT-OD v1.2.2 ACF audit release
metadata.description: Release-facing metadata for SPOT-OD v1.2.2, a version-pinned supplementary evidence package for a simulator-bound sparse-visibility orbit-determination self-audit record. This release adds the AdaptiveCandidateFusion audit/table tier to the prior public v1.2.1 package: paper/tables/adaptive_candidate_fusion_full_training_poc.tex; fixed-soft full-training campaign summaries under results/adaptive_candidate_fusion_fixed_soft_training_campaigns_20260623/; the 15-seed validation-selected global scenario portfolio under results/adaptive_candidate_fusion_global_scenario_portfolio_15seed_20260624/; and generator/test support in scripts/build_paper_assets.py and focused ACF tests. The v1.2.2 Zenodo DOI is pending and must be filled only after Zenodo mints it. The prior v1.2.1 DOI is 10.5281/zenodo.20811701. Scientific metrics are as recorded, not upgraded to operational validation. ACF remains validation-selected compact-simulator PoC evidence, not operational precise-reference validation, not independent-machine reproduction, not third-party validation, not full raw/training/all-filter reproduction, and not universal learned-OD superiority.
metadata.notes: DOI pending: fill the v1.2.2 DOI only after Zenodo mints it. Do not fabricate Zenodo archived-file MD5, GitHub asset byte count, or GitHub asset SHA-256 before the v1.2.2 assets are published. Version 1.2.2 supersedes v1.2.1 only by adding the ACF audit/table tier and manuscript claim-boundary wording. Version 1.2.1 remains archived at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20811701. Scientific metrics are as recorded, not upgraded to operational validation.

github_release.commit_note: Fill after the release tag is created.
